dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 'momentum' indicator which is not in the allowed list. Substituted MACD histogram (macd_hist) as the closest available momentum indicator that crosses the zero line. MACD histogram represents momentum and crosses zero when momentum changes sign from negative to positive (buy) or positive to negative (sell). Calculation period is author-silent; using default MACD parameters.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 'momentum' indicator which is not in the allowed list. Substituted MACD histogram (macd_hist) as the closest available momentum indicator that crosses the zero line. MACD histogram represents momentum and crosses zero when momentum changes sign from negative to positive (buy) or positive to negative (sell). Calculation period is author-silent; using default MACD parameters.

source_rule_text: Buy when momentum turns from negative to positive; sell when momentum turns from positive to negative.
